texto: Really?' Shep scoffed and rolled his eyes. 'You can't be serious! Whitey, you come from the streets of North Philly, and you're scared of a bunch of backwoods butt-monkeys that thinks that an awesome Saturday night consists of drinking the cheapest beer they can steal from their daddy's huntin' coolers, tippin' some cows, stealin' a tracter, takin' it for a joy ride then leaving it on the 9th green of the golf course, and getting a knobber from one of the skankleaders. Seriously, Whitey, you have issues that I can't even begin to imagine.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Danae Ayusso que provoca temas ligados a lideranca. Ao questionar “Really?' Shep scoffed and rolled his eyes. 'You can't be serious! Whitey, you come from the stree…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre lideranca, high-school, paranormal, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
